• Interactive Magic 8 Ball with AI-powered responses via Puter.js API.
  • Offers 5 selectable answer personalities: friendly, mean, silly, dramatic, roast.
  • Includes 3D WebGL particle effects and shake animation during queries.
    await puter.ai.chat(systemPrompt);
    magicBall.classList.add('is-shaking');

This web app simulates a Magic 8 Ball with AI-generated, style-adjusted answers to user questions. Users can select from multiple personality tones for responses and trigger queries via button click or Enter key. It includes 3D particle effects, a shake animation during processing, and a sleek dark-themed responsive UI with Tailwind CSS.
